title: FAIR Annotations Vocabulary Meta-Schema
description: Defines the syntax of custom FAIR annotation keywords. These keywords are silently ignored by standard validators (Mechanism 1: Custom Annotations) but carry machine-actionable metadata for FAIR-aware tools.

i18nString.title: Multilingual String
i18nString.description: A string that can be a simple literal OR a language-mapped object (keys are BCP-47 tags). Used for labels.

i18nText.title: Multilingual Rich Text
i18nText.description: A Markdown-formatted string that can be a simple literal OR a language-mapped object. Used for descriptions.

markdownText.title: Markdown Text
markdownText.description: A string containing text formatted with Markdown syntax.

uriOrCurie.title: URI or CURIE
uriOrCurie.description: A full URI or a Compact URI (e.g. 'skos:Concept') supported by specialized FAIR engines.

uriString.title: Absolute URI
uriString.description: A string representing a valid absolute URI.

// Universal Scope.description: Keywords that can be used on any schema object to provide basic semantic identification.

fair:resourceType.title: Resource Architectural Role
fair:resourceType.description: Explicitly declares the structural nature of the schema object. Defaults (when omitted): a root schema is implicitly a 'dataset', while a property/column is implicitly a 'variable'. Use 'data-product' for the complex root of a multi-resource bundle.

fair:conceptRef.title: Concept Reference
fair:conceptRef.description: The URI or CURIE of the semantic concept associated with this property or value.

fair:concept.title: Concept Literal
fair:concept.description: The human-readable formal name of the concept.

fair:label.title: Contextual Label
fair:label.description: A short, human-readable label for the property, potentially multilingual.

fair:description.title: Rich Description
fair:description.description: A detailed, potentially multilingual and markdown-formatted description of the property.

// Dataset Scope.description: Keywords that describe a container, resource, or entire dataset (Provenance & Coverage).

fair:datasetRelations.title: Dataset Relationships
fair:datasetRelations.description: Describes relationships between this dataset and other resources (e.g. isPartOf, isVersionOf). Supports joins via source/target variables.

relationType.description: The type of relationship (DDI/Dublin Core aligned).

targetRef.description: Reference to the target dataset (URI or JSON Pointer).

sourceVariables.description: Property names in the current dataset used in the relationship.

targetVariables.description: Property names in the target dataset.

fair:entities.title: Attributed Entities
fair:entities.description: A list of entities (individuals, organizations, projects, software) associated with the resource, including their roles.

name.title: Entity Name
name.description: The human-readable name of the entity.

entityRef.title: Entity Reference
entityRef.description: The URI identifying the entity (e.g. ROR, ORCID, or Project URI).

type.title: Entity Type Literal
type.description: The human-readable category of the entity. Suggested: 'Individual', 'Organization', 'Project', 'Software', 'Agent' (AI powered), 'Other'. See CV: https://highvaluedata.net/fair-data-schema/cv/entity-types-v1

typeRef.title: Entity Type Reference
typeRef.description: The URI or CURIE identifying the entity category in a controlled vocabulary (e.g. PROV-O or Schema.org).

role.title: Role Literal
role.description: The human-readable name of the role (e.g. 'Provider', 'Producer', 'Data Curator', 'Data Archive'). See CV: https://highvaluedata.net/fair-data-schema/cv/entity-roles-v1

roleRef.title: Role Reference
roleRef.description: The URI or CURIE of the role definition. Suggested: FAIR Data Schema Roles (https://highvaluedata.net/fair-data-schema/cv/entity-roles-v1) or DDI ContributorRole (https://rdf-vocabulary.ddialliance.org/ddi-cv/ContributorRole/1.0.2/ContributorRole.html).

fair:provider.title: Provider Literal (DEPRECATED)
fair:provider.description: DEPRECATED: Use fair:entities with role 'Provider' instead. The name of the providing organization or person.

fair:providerRef.title: Provider Reference (DEPRECATED)
fair:providerRef.description: DEPRECATED: Use fair:entities with roleRef pointing to a provider role instead. The URI identifying the provider (e.g. ROR or ORCID).

fair:license.title: License Literal
fair:license.description: The human-readable name of the license.

fair:licenseRef.title: License Reference
fair:licenseRef.description: The URI of the license (e.g. SPDX URI).

fair:temporalCoverage.title: Temporal Coverage Literal
fair:temporalCoverage.description: A description of the time period covered by the data.

fair:temporalCoverageRef.title: Temporal Coverage Reference
fair:temporalCoverageRef.description: URI referencing a standardized time period.

fair:spatialCoverage.title: Spatial Coverage Literal
fair:spatialCoverage.description: The name of the geographic area covered.

fair:spatialCoverageRef.title: Spatial Coverage Reference
fair:spatialCoverageRef.description: URI identifying the area in a gazetteer or geographic database.

fair:population.title: Population Literal
fair:population.description: The specific group bound by time and space (DDI: associated with Instance variables, e.g. 'Students in District A in 2019').

fair:populationRef.title: Population Reference
fair:populationRef.description: URI of the specific dataset population.

// Property Scope.description: Keywords describing the data representation and semantic identity of a leaf variable.

fair:classification.title: Classification Literal
fair:classification.description: The human-readable name of the classification authority or code list (e.g. 'ISCO-08').

fair:classificationRef.title: Classification Authority Reference
fair:classificationRef.description: A list of URIs identifying the classification system, ontology, or authority governing this property (e.g. a skos:ConceptScheme).

fair:unit.title: Unit Literal
fair:unit.description: The human-readable name of the unit of measurement.

fair:unitRef.title: Unit Reference
fair:unitRef.description: URI of the unit definition (e.g. from QUDT or OM).

fair:quantity.title: Quantity Kind Literal
fair:quantity.description: The name of the quantity kind (e.g. 'Mass').

fair:quantityRef.title: Quantity Kind Reference
fair:quantityRef.description: URI of the quantity kind definition.

fair:unitType.title: Unit Type Literal
fair:unitType.description: The observation unit or unit type (DDI: associated with Conceptual variables, e.g. 'Person').

fair:unitTypeRef.title: Unit Type Reference
fair:unitTypeRef.description: URI of the observation unit / unit type definition.

fair:universe.title: Universe Literal
fair:universe.description: The broad population or universe (DDI: associated with Represented variables, e.g. 'Students').

fair:universeRef.title: Universe Reference
fair:universeRef.description: URI of the broad universe definition.

fair:instanceVariableRef.title: Instance Variable Reference
fair:instanceVariableRef.description: DDI: Link to the specific dataset-level implementation of this variable.

fair:representedVariableRef.title: Represented Variable Reference
fair:representedVariableRef.description: DDI: Link to the shared measurement or representation definition (e.g. a shared code list).

fair:conceptualVariableRef.title: Conceptual Variable Reference
fair:conceptualVariableRef.description: DDI: Link to the high-level semantic phenomenon or conceptual definition.
